text: The first space feels silent and anticipatory, as if I'm waiting for something to begin. Its emptiness amplifies my awareness of myself within it. In the second scene, surrounded by bold colors and futuristic text, I sense curiosity and wonder. The room feels energetic, inviting me to ponder the intersection of humanity and technology. Presence here is invigorating yet slightly disorienting—reminding me of the thin veil between contemplation and active engagement.
